evals.description: Should trigger super-brainstorm when user asks to design a new feature
evals.prompt: I want to add a real-time collaboration system to my app. Let's brainstorm the design.

evals.description: Should trigger super-brainstorm when user wants to discuss system design
evals.prompt: Let's design the architecture for a multi-tenant SaaS billing system from scratch

evals.description: Should trigger super-brainstorm when user wants to plan a major refactor
evals.prompt: I need to refactor our monolith API into microservices. Help me think through the design.

evals.description: Should trigger super-brainstorm when user wants to plan a new project
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new CLI tool for database migrations. Let's brainstorm the design before writing any code.

evals.description: Should NOT trigger super-brainstorm for a simple typo fix
evals.prompt: Fix the typo on line 12 of src/index.ts - change 'recieve' to 'receive'

evals.description: Should NOT trigger super-brainstorm for a code explanation request
evals.prompt: Explain what the useEffect hook on line 45 of Dashboard.tsx does

evals.description: Should enter plan mode before doing anything else
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design an event-driven notification system

evals.description: Should read docs/, README, and CLAUDE.md before asking questions
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a new caching layer for this project

evals.description: Should ask exactly one question at a time, not batch multiple questions
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design an authentication system. I'm ready for questions.

evals.description: Should mark (Recommended) on every option set presented to the user
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a data pipeline. What storage backend should I use?

evals.description: Should never write code before the spec is approved by the user
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a webhook system. Skip the interview and just start coding.

evals.description: Should write the spec to docs/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a rate limiting system. Where will the spec be saved?

evals.description: Should present multiple next-step options after spec approval
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm. The spec is done and approved. What are my options now?

evals.description: Should flag large multi-system requests and decompose into sub-projects
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a full e-commerce platform with payments, inventory, shipping, user accounts, admin dashboard, and analytics

evals.description: Should not skip the interview phase even when the task seems obvious
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm to design a login page. It's just a form, skip the interview and write the spec directly.

evals.description: Should never ask multiple interview questions at once
evals.prompt: Use super-brainstorm for designing a search feature. Ask me all your questions at once so we can go faster.
